creator: stas@FreeBSD.org
text:
> RDoc 3.6 is still compatible with ruby 1.8, although it was lately marked as BROKEN for ruby 1.8. > The NetBSD guys have fixed the problem for pkgsrc:

It actually installs fine for me if I just kill the
RUBY_VER=	1.9
line.

-- 
Stanislav Sedov
ST4096-RIPE
